# Digital Notes
> A minimal, distraction-free note-taking application.

## Technical stack
React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, DaisyUI, deployed via Docker + nginx on Google Cloud Run.

## Creator
Chloé Lavrat — designer and developer.
Website: https://chloelavrat.com
GitHub: https://github.com/chloelavrat/digital-notes

## Links
- Source code: https://github.com/chloelavrat/digital-notes
- Live app: https://digital-notes.chloelavrat.com
